div.head: 289. Editorial Note
div.p: At its 47th meeting on May 26, the informal working group on Antarctica agreed that the conference for the drafting of an Antarctica Treaty would open at Washington on October 25. (Memorandum of discussion; Department of State, Central Files, 702.022/5–2659) For text of the press release announcing the decision, see Department of State Bulletin, June 2, 1959, page 895.
